title: Egyptians Built Pyramids in Decades. I Built a Cooler One with Python in a Few Hours.
summary: I wrote a Python script that generates a full pyramid complex inside Minecraft — central pyramid, walls, moat, entrance corridor, and interior halls. The whole thing took a few hours. The Egyptians needed 20 years.

title: How I Automated SAS-to-Snowflake Column Matching with AI
summary: We had hundreds of tables on both SAS and Snowflake with different column names, different content, and extra columns on both sides. I built a pipeline that reduced per-table matching from days to minutes.
